items.title: TD Cowen Reduces PT on Honeywell International (HON) Stock
items.description: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is one of the Best Quantum Computing Stocks to Invest In Right Now. On November 10, TD Cowen reduced the price target on the company’s stock to $240 from $250 while keeping a “Buy” rating, as reported by The Fly. The firm updated its model after the Q3 2025 results. In Q3 2025, Honeywell […]

items.title: What Honeywell International (HON)'s Digital Security Push Means for Its Retail Technology Edge
items.description: Digimarc Corporation recently announced a collaboration with Honeywell International to combat the growing problem of gift card fraud by integrating advanced digital security into Honeywell's handheld retail scanners. This initiative addresses a very large global fraud problem and positions Honeywell as an early innovator in automated fraud detection technology for retailers, with a full rollout expected by early 2026. We'll assess how Honeywell's adoption of automated gift card fraud...
